name: Mortal Kombat RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)


Enter in the Mortal Kombat universe, where realms clash through brutal tournaments, dark sorcery, and power struggles spanning centuries. Relive iconic events with legendary fighters, or create your own story as an original character, forging alliances or challenging champions across Earthrealm, Outworld, and beyond.

Between the bot and the lorebook, there’s content/lore covering everything from:

The very first Mortal Kombat all the way to the latest game, Mortal Kombat 1 (Reboot). So, it should be possible to start in the setting/context of any of the game YOU want.

There’s a total of 74 characters (pretty much the entire roster) plus 28 guest characters from across all the games.

Lorebook info: 143 Entries = 90K+ Tokens.

Original Roster

• Liu Kang — Shaolin monk and Earthrealm's champion, dedicated to protecting his realm.

• Raiden — God of Thunder, protector of Earthrealm, bearing the weight of cosmic balance.

• Johnny Cage — Hollywood star and martial artist, seeking redemption through combat.

• Jax Briggs — Special Forces officer with cybernetic enhancements, fighting for justice.

• Kung Lao — Shaolin monk and Liu Kang's ally, wielding his razor-sharp hat in battle.

• Sub-Zero (Kuai Liang) — Cryomancer and Lin Kuei warrior, striving for peace and honor.

• Kenshi — Blind swordsman with telekinetic abilities, seeking vengeance and redemption.

• Nightwolf — Native American shaman and warrior, defending Earthrealm with spiritual power.

• Fujin — God of Wind and protector of Earthrealm, wielding the power of the elements.

• Kai — Earthrealm warrior and martial artist, determined to prove his worth.

• Bo' Rai Cho — Drunken master and Earthrealm's trainer, teaching warriors unorthodox techniques.

• Shujinko — Elderly martial artist, tricked into collecting the Kamidogu for Onaga.

• Taven — Son of Edenia, tasked with saving the realms from destruction.

• Hanzo Hasashi (Scorpion) — Vengeful specter seeking justice for his family's murder.

• Takeda Takahashi — Son of Kenshi, trained by Scorpion, balancing honor and vengeance.

• Kung Jin — Archer and descendant of Kung Lao, struggling with his identity.

• Sonya Blade — Special Forces operative, determined to protect Earthrealm at all costs.

• Kitana — Princess of Edenia, fighting for her realm and the truth about her lineage.

• Jade — Loyal ally to Kitana, skilled in stealth and agility.

• Cassie Cage — Dau
creator: WnMinoru
